wiki.summary: “Juna” is the 7th track and a fan favorite off of her new album Charm. The song explores the idea of having such a deep level of connection with someone such that everything becomes instinct. The album and song are reminiscent of the 70’s through light and airy vocal melodies accompanied by brass and percussion, including a simple and clean transition between the use of a mouth trumpet to an actual trumpet. Read more on Last.fm.
